summary: Frontend-only testing of the TradingBoard screen rewrite. All 4 zones render correctly and all interactions work as expected.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings in console: 'shadow*' style props should use 'boxShadow', and 'props.pointerEvents' should use 'style.pointerEvents'. Non-blocking but worth cleaning up.

action_items: Optional: Replace shadow* style props with boxShadow to clear deprecation warnings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade screen fully functional. All 4 zones render. Card fan uses absolute positioning with rotation (no ScrollView). Tapping fan card moves to Zone 2, tapping Zone 2 card removes it. Haggle adds AI card. Reject clears Zone 2 and new round starts after 2s. Accept at willingness=100 executes trade, increments trade count, starts new round.
